description: Parse pose-confidence scores from a DiffDock output directory (single-complex or batch), rank predictions, classify them High/Moderate/Low, and export a per-pose summary CSV.
rules: read-only — reads DiffDock rank*_confidence*.sdf outputs, never modifies them
pure Python stdlib — runs without PyTorch, RDKit, or a GPU
always exports summary.csv to record_store; the printed summary is teed to a log
usage: Set RESULTS_DIR (a DiffDock output dir). Optionally set TOP (top-N per complex), THRESHOLD (min confidence), BEST (top-N across complexes). Output: summary.csv.
limitation: Confidence reflects model certainty about the pose, NOT binding affinity. Scores are parsed from filenames / SDF properties; non-standard output layouts may yield no predictions.
